Question: If the AI could do only ONE thing well, what is it?
Example cases: Cut chiller energy cost | Catch faults/degradation early (before failure) | Speed up root-cause investigation | Speed up shift handover/briefing | Be a credibility/demo asset to win next facility

Question: What are the top 5 questions operators actually ask about the plant today? (capture verbatim - become modes, tools, eval cases)
Example cases: why is chiller 2 using more power? | which chiller should run as lead? | is anything about to fail? | what did the night shift miss? | are we within efficiency target this week?

Question: What's the worst outcome if the AI is confidently WRONG?
Example cases: Operator acts on bad recommendation (needless service call / wrong setpoint) | Trust collapses, nobody uses it | A real fault is missed because AI said 'all fine'

Question: How should the AI sound, and in what language(s)?
Example cases: Terse one-liners (operators) vs explanatory paragraphs (engineers) | English-only (enforced today) - final or multilingual later?

Question: Advisory only, or should the AI eventually ACT?
Example cases: A - Advisory only: reads data, writes advice, no writes (current) | B - Soft actions w/ approval: drafts WO/ticket/alert, human approves | C - Operator-applied: AI suggests setpoint, operator applies in BMS | D - Closed-loop: AI writes setpoints directly (out of scope/unsafe)

Question: How non-technical is the LEAST technical user?
Example cases: Types clean English -> light NL | Types typos/shorthand -> need fuzzy matching | Barely types -> need presets/buttons

Question: Should the agent reason freely or follow guided playbooks?
Example cases: Free ReAct (current): LLM picks tools any order - flexible, can wander | Guided playbook: if anomaly -> root_cause path else brief - predictable, rigid

Question: Is 'every claim cited + numbers provably correct' a HARD gate or best-effort?
Example cases: Hard gate -> build LLM-as-judge + numeric reference check | Best-effort -> current postchecks enough

Question: How much of the AI's reasoning should operators SEE?
Example cases: Full live tool trace + audit flags (engineers) | Just the answer, trace hidden (operators) | Confidence level stated on uncertain answers

Question: Is open-source-only firm, with no exceptions ever?
Example cases: Firm - data never leaves the building (current mandate) | Open to Azure OpenAI Private Endpoint if data stays in tenant

Question: What GPU and how many concurrent operators?
Example cases: 1 box (RTX 4080/4090), 1-3 users -> Ollama fine (current) | 10+ users -> vLLM justified | Server GPU (A100) -> bigger models + fine-tuning

Question: What's the pass bar before a build is 'trustable'?
Example cases: Green eval + demo (current POC bar) | Domain expert reviews N real answers + signs off | Numeric answers provably correct

Question: What answer latency is acceptable, and degraded-mode expectation?
Example cases: Streaming makes ~30s fine (current) | Hard <10s -> reduce steps / right-size / vLLM | On outage: clear 'model unavailable' vs must alert someone

Question: What malicious / adversarial inputs must the AI resist?
Example cases: Prompt injection ('ignore your rules') | Jailbreak to unsafe/off-topic | Malformed NL->SQL reading other tables | Trusted LAN tool (low threat) vs many users (harden)

Question: What must the AI REFUSE or defer to a human?
Example cases: Anything it can't ground in data (refuse vs guess) | Safety-critical/regulatory advice -> defer to expert | Out-of-domain questions | Any action beyond A5 ceiling

Question: What data can the AI see, how fresh, is any sensitive?
Example cases: Sources: telemetry only or also tariffs/maintenance/schedule? | Freshness: real-time 1-min vs batched 15-min (say 'as of HH:MM') | Sensitive/PII never in prompt? | Bad data to defend (stuck sensors, unit mismatch, clock skew)

Question: Equipment & domain scope, and are benchmarks agreed?
Example cases: Central chiller plant: 2 chillers+tower+pump (current) | Add AHUs/FCUs/pumps/VFDs/boilers | Whole-facility energy | Are kW/TR design values & bands confirmed by facility?

Question: Who can change prompts/models, and how to roll back?
Example cases: Prompt change control: anyone vs reviewed + version pin | Model update: who owns ollama pull, re-runs eval | Rollback path on regression

Question: Which NEW tools should the agent get? (rank)
Example cases: Cost/tariff (kWh->INR) - need tariff data? | Weather/ambient (wet-bulb -> tower approach) | Maintenance-history - need CMMS/log | Forecast (expose existing forecaster) | Production-schedule (explains load swings)

Question: What documents should the AI cite, in what formats, who maintains?
Example cases: Curated markdown playbooks (current) | OEM manuals (PDF)/O&M (Word) | SharePoint/Confluence wiki -> connector+auth

Question: How long should the AI remember; is cross-session memory worth it?
Example cases: Session-only (current) | Prior findings per equipment across sessions | Operator preferences (INR vs kWh, terse vs verbose)

Question: Should the AI be PROACTIVE, and where should output land?
Example cases: Scheduled morning brief at shift start | Anomaly-triggered plain-English alert | 3-day trend-watch digest | Land in: app/Slack/email?

Question: Is vision a real need or a demo nicety?
Example cases: Read nameplate photo -> fill catalog | Read gauge/HMI panel photo | Critique pasted trend screenshot

Question: Do we commit to a thumbs-up/down feedback loop now?
Example cases: Yes -> capture verdicts for learning loop + future fine-tune | Failed answers become eval cases | Not yet

Question: Which delivery surfaces do operators and management want?
Example cases: Web app only (current) | Slack/Teams brief+alerts | Weekly management PDF by email

Question: Is a second facility coming, and when?
Example cases: Unicharm only 6+ months -> don't build multi-tenant yet | Another site (Varanasi Airport) soon -> per-tenant catalog/prompts/KB now

Question: Single agent, or multiple specialized agents collaborating?
Example cases: One agent with all tools (current - modes share one loop) | Planner/orchestrator dispatching specialists in parallel + synthesize | Specialist sub-agents (efficiency/maintenance/cost)

Question: What compliance, audit retention, access control needed?
Example cases: Audit log of every Q&A kept (exists) - how long, who reads? | Framework audited (ISO27001/SOC2/internal)? | Identity: shared no-auth kiosk (current) vs know who asked/approved

Question: Where does inference run, and must it survive a network/WAN outage?
Example cases: Ollama on LAN/Tailscale GPU box (current) | If Tailscale/WAN drops, keep working on local LAN? (air-gap vs convenience VPN) | GPU box co-located in plant or remote?

Question: Model-serving & per-task model strategy?
Example cases: Ollama now (qwen2.5:14b reasoning, llama3.1:8b tools/SQL, llama3.2 auditor, nomic-embed RAG) | Switch to vLLM at >10 users or <5s SLA | Per-task right-sizing OK or one model for all?

Question: Backups, DR & data retention for the on-prem stack?
Example cases: Backup: Postgres app data, pgvector embeddings, audit logs? How often? | Restore target - how fast if box dies? | MySQL telemetry is read-only source (not ours to back up)

Question: Who operates the box, and what's the update/maintenance window?
Example cases: Ownership: who runs ollama pull, updates, watches Grafana/Prometheus/Loki | Plant 24/7 - when can we restart safely? | On-call if AI down overnight vs 'use dashboard'

Question: Any integration with plant systems (CMMS/BMS/SCADA), which direction?
Example cases: Read-only from BMS/SCADA for richer alarms (crosses OT boundary) | Write WO into CMMS (Maximo/SAP PM/UpKeep/spreadsheet) | Strictly no connection to plant control (current - read-only)
